subcodes.first_line: O thou spiritual friend! Thy services are accepted in the Kingdom of Abha, mentioned in this merciful Assemblage and the cause of joy
subcodes.subjects: @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity, @House of Worship [Mashriqu'l-Adhkar], @high station of the true believer, @praise and encouragement, @call to action, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness
